chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.191 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For hearing of Main Case 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1677/2018 24.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Inzimam Sharif Advocate for the Appellant Mr. Shah Hussain, Assistant Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel for the appellant does not press this appeal which is dismissed as withdrawn.
